params.name: SpongeRob
params.description: This sponge is indigenous to the remote part of Bibini Bottom, the home to many marine life! The sponge is the most unique presence among them... As the most primitive multicellular creature, it has neither limbs, nervous systems, nor organs, and comes off looking like an insignificant piece of collagen!
